## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first and linked it below.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes (394 tests, all green).
- [ ] I added tests for new behavior.
- [ ] The diff is focused — one concern per PR.
- [ ] I signed off my commits (`git commit -s`).

## Related issue

Closes #

## What changed

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Screenshots / TUI output

If the change affects TUI rendering, include a before/after.

---

> **Response time:** I review PRs ~weekly. Single-reviewer project — expect one round of feedback before merge.
